items.title: Futuri Announces Advancements to TopLine AI, Featuring Instant Custom Research, Sales Presentations, and CRM Integration to Help Teams Close Business Faster
items.description: Futuri has launched major AI upgrades to TopLine, its sales intelligence system trusted by media companies worldwide. Using Agentic AI that integrates directly into CRMs like Salesforce and HubSpot, TopLine is redefining how Sales Executives prepare, present, close, and renew business.
